distractors.off_target_set: Quantities that are cheaply lookup-able; decisions requiring precision over order-of-magnitude; meta-questions about Fermi estimation
distractors.description: Items where the real answer is a query away, or where precise values are needed rather than order-of-magnitude

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND log_error_reduction >= 0.20
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
